claim: Claude 3.5 Sonnet (updated Oct 2024) improved from 33.4% to 49% on SWEBench; huge leap in coding capability vs previous version
actionable: Upgrade to new 3.5 Sonnet for coding tasks; significant performance improvement over the previous iteration

claim: Claude Computer Use API allows models to take screenshots, click, type, and navigate UIs; early demos show it can search, edit spreadsheets, and research
actionable: Explore Claude Computer Use for browser-automation agents; handle most UI interactions without custom APIs

claim: Computer Use agents made errors during Anthropic's own demos (stopped recordings, searched photos); requires human oversight and controlled environments
actionable: Don't run Computer Use agents on production systems without monitoring; keep hands on the wheel to stop bad actions
